# JSDoc Expert Agent

This project is a specification-first system for mastering and enforcing JSDoc standards.

## Project Structure
- /content: Atomic Markdown pillars (The Specs).
- /agent/rules: Automated guardrails for code documentation.
- /agent/skills: Playbooks for reasoning workflows.
- /mcp/tools: MCP server tools for external code interaction.

## Core Pillars
1. Tags: Documentation of all JSDoc tags.
2. Types: Type definition standards.
3. Modules: Module and export conventions.
4. Generics: Template usage standards.

## Agent Instructions
When assisting with JSDoc, prioritize the content found in /content, validate against /agent/rules, and follow the workflows defined in /agent/skills.
